text.title: decision-tree-cloud-provider Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for decision-tree-cloud-provider. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: When existing technology investments strongly tie to one provider (Microsoft AD/Office 365 → Azure; Google Workspace/BigQuery → GCP), that provider MUST be the default choice unless a specific workload disqualification exists. Ignoring existing investments wastes BYOL savings and integration effort.
rule.rationale: Switching identity providers (Active Directory ↔ Google Workspace) or analytics platforms (BigQuery ↔ Redshift) costs significantly more than the marginal cloud service cost difference. Existing investments create strong gravitational pull toward the aligned provider.
